title: Foxablue's Lucky Blocks
description: Brings back the Lucky Blocks mod in a new and fresh way, adding three new variants to cause chaos in your world!
body:
### **Foxablue's Lucky Blocks**

Foxablue's Lucky Blocks adds three new blocks to Minecraft inspired by the original Lucky Blocks mod. These have the potential to be lucky, unlucky, or both, based on the execution of over 100 custom events.

**Features**

- 3 new blocks - the Lucky Block, Red Lucky Block, and Blue Lucky Block.
- Survival-friendly crafting recipes that allow for balanced creation of these blocks
- Over 100 different code events that can mix together randomly to form crazy events every time a Lucky Block is broken
- Red Lucky blocks that only execute unlucky events
- Standard Lucky Blocks that execute random events
- Blue Lucky Blocks that only execute lucky events

**Credits**

- Fully made by Foxablue! :3
- Ideas inspired by the original Lucky Blocks mod: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lucky-block
- Have fun with the mod, idk what to put here! 😂
